mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, order_number, order_status, subtotal, discount_amount, tax_amount, shipping_fee, total_amount, coupon_id, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, user_id, order_number, order_status, subtotal, discount_amount, tax_amount, shipping_fee, total_amount, coupon_id, created_at, updated_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.order_number, o.order_status, o.subtotal, o.discount_amount, o.tax_amount, o.shipping_fee, o.total_amount, o.coupon_id, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o INNER JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.user_id, o.order_number, o.order_status, o.subtotal, o.discount_amount, o.tax_amount, o.shipping_fee, o.total_amount, o.coupon_id, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o INNER JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN payments pay ON o.id = pay.order_id LEFT JOIN shipments s ON o.id = s.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.user_id, o.order_number, o.order_status, o.subtotal, o.discount_amount, o.tax_amount, o.shipping_fee, o.total_amount, o.coupon_id, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT order_status AS Key, SUM(total_amount) AS Value FROM orders GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY Value DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, order_number, order_status, subtotal, discount_amount, tax_amount, shipping_fee, total_amount, coupon_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{UserId}, #{OrderNumber}, #{OrderStatus}, #{Subtotal}, #{DiscountAmount}, #{TaxAmount}, #{ShippingFee}, #{TotalAmount}, #{CouponId}, #{CreatedAt}, #{UpdatedAt}) RETURNING id
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS sale_date, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales, AVG(total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MIN(total_amount) AS min_order, MAX(total_amount) AS max_order FROM orders WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY sale_date DESC
